ideas.title: Creatine and alcohol: can you drink on creatine?
ideas.why: High-volume FAQ-type search. Alcohol vs performance is a common crossover query.
ideas.researchNotes: Draft written: content/faqs/creatine-and-alcohol.mdx (draft: true, QA 80%). Incomplete: real affiliate link placeholders (amazonUrl fields are '#'). Research note: no dangerous interaction; alcohol is anti-recovery. Need human to verify Water with creatine vs alcohol tension claim. Prices unavailable at time of draft.

ideas.title: Micronized creatine vs regular — is it worth the markup?
ideas.why: Product-specific query people search before buying. ON/CON-CRET territory.
ideas.researchNotes: Draft written: content/best/micronized-creatine-vs-regular.mdx (draft: true, QA 80%). Products section includes ON Micronized and Nutricost but amazonUrl fields are placeholders ('#'). Research supports: micronization improves solubility, not bioavailability — premium can be worth it for people with sensitive stomachs. Need human to fill in real Amazon ASIN links and current prices.

ideas.title: Creatine cycle: do you need to cycle on/off?
ideas.why: Annual cycle interest + common myth. Dense FAQ answer with a comparison tie-in.
ideas.note: Drafted 2026-07-01 as content/faqs/creatine-cycle.mdx. QA score: 80% (REVIEW). Sources: ISSN 2017 position stand (PubMed 28902176), ISSN systematic review. Products section empty (draft).
